---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or capability for the platform.
title: 'feat(scope): [Short Summary of Feature]'
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 1. Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe. (e.g., "As a Branch Manager, I find it takes too many clicks to modify stock levels...")

## 2. Proposed Solution
Describe the solution or behavior you want to see implemented.

## 3. Operations Impact
Describe how this feature improves restaurant operations (does it save time, reduce waste, increase revenue, or boost staff productivity?):

## 4. Alternate Solutions Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 5. Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or mockup diagrams about the feature request here.
